title: Talent Card · Inside Career Hub
description: A web-native Talent Card surface added as a new tab on the Career Hub employee profile, next to Development plans. Built for online use (not print) — fully responsive across desktop, tablet, and mobile. Three-section layout: hero with key facts, Current snapshot (skills, positions, external history, gigs as a vertical timeline), and Future plans (development opportunities, career goals, skills to develop, development actions with progress bars and status pills). Uses real Octuple SkillTag, Pill, NumberBadge, and Button components.
author: ypike-eightfold
